name: Elbow Pasta with Basil, Parsley & Lime
recipeIngredient: Grated rind and juice of 1 lime
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the garlic in olive oil until golden.
2. Remove from heat and add basil. The basil should wilt in hot oil and become bright green and glossy.
3. Cook pasta until al dente, then drain.
4. Toss with garlic and basil mixture.
5. Add grated lime and lime juice. Season with salt, pepper or cayenne.
6. Serve immediately.
